team_name: TenderShield: Automated Document Verification & Eligibility Assistant
summary: Design an AI platform to automatically scan bidder submissions for mandatory compliance, flagging missing or blurry documents for human review. Reduces manual 'first-pass' screening time by up to 80%.
optimization_claims: Up to 80% reduction in manual 'first-pass' screening time
constraints_addressed: Clerical oversights leading to bidder disqualification
